c.d: The range of operating systems and devices the app supports, including cross-platform functionality.
c.s: Official app websites, app store listings

c.d: The maximum file size the app allows for transfer, indicating suitability for large files.
The speed at which files are transferred, affecting efficiency.
The security measures implemented, such as encryption and password protection.
c.s: Official security documentation, independent security audits

c.n: User Interface and Ease of Use
c.d: The intuitiveness and user-friendliness of the app's interface.
The pricing structure, including free tiers and premium subscription options.
The app's ability to integrate with other platforms and services.
The ability to transfer files without an internet connection.
c.s: Official app features list, user guides

c.d: The variety of file types the app can handle.
The quality of customer support and the app's reliability.
